zh.lifeSummary: 當Marjorie Stewart Countess of Moray於1348年出生在蘇格蘭艾斯爾凱爾時，她的父親Robert II Stewart King of Scotland32歲，母親Elizabeth Mure of Rowallan28歲。她於1370年7月11日與John Dunbar 1st Earl of Moray在英國蘇格蘭結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1417年5月6日在英國蘇格蘭莫雷達納維艾 卡素享年69歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Marjorie Stewart Countess of Moray于1348年出生在苏格兰艾斯爾凱爾时，她的父亲Robert II Stewart King of Scotland32岁，母亲Elizabeth Mure of Rowallan28岁。她于1370年7月11日与John Dunbar 1st Earl of Moray在英国苏格兰结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于1417年5月6日在英国苏格兰莫雷達納維艾 卡素享年69岁。

nameMeanings.name: Stewart
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish (Lanarkshire) and English: originally an occupational name for an administrative official of an estate, from Middle English stiward, Old English stigweard, stīweard, a compound of stig ‘house(hold)’ + weard ‘guardian’. In the Anglo-Saxon period this title was used of an officer controlling the domestic affairs of a household, especially of the royal household; after the Norman Conquest it was also used more widely as the native equivalent of Seneschal, for the steward of a manor or manager of an estate. In Scotland the term was also used of a magistrate originally appointed by the king to administer crown lands, forming a stewartry.

History: Stuart or Stewart is the surname of one of the great families of Scotland, the royal family of Scotland from the 14th century, and of England from 1603, when James VI of Scotland acceded to the English throne as James I. There were many minor branches of the family left in Britain after the flight of James II in 1688, but not every bearer of the surname can claim relationship with the royal house, even in Scotland. Every great house in medieval England and Scotland had its steward, and in many cases the office gave rise to a hereditary surname. The fall of the house of Stuart in Britain, conversely, led to the establishment of several highly placed branches bearing this surname in continental Europe, which are in most cases related to the old Scottish royal family.

variants.name: Stuart
meanings: Scottish (Aberdeenshire and Banffshire): variant of   Stewart  . This French form of the name, there being no W in the French language, was adopted by Mary, Queen of Scots, on her return to Scotland in 1561 and has since come to be more popular among royalists than the earlier spellings.
History: Stuart or Stewart is the surname of one of the great families of Scotland (see note at   Stewart  ).

variants.name: Stewardson
meanings: English (Lancashire and Westmorland): patronymic from Middle English stiward ‘steward’ (see Stewart ) + -son ‘son of the steward’.

variants.name: Steward
meanings: English (London and East Anglia): variant of   Stewart  .

nameMeanings.name: Marjorie
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: The usual modern spelling of Margery . It seems to have arisen as the result of folk etymological association of the name with that of the herb marjoram ( compare Rosemary ). This word is of uncertain origin; its Middle English and Old French form was majorane, without the first -r-.

variants.name: Marjory
meanings: The usual modern spelling of Margery . It seems to have arisen as the result of folk etymological association of the name with that of the herb marjoram ( compare Rosemary ). This word is of uncertain origin; its Middle English and Old French form was majorane, without the first -r-.

en.lifeSummary: When Marjorie Stewart Countess of Moray was born in 1348, in Kyle, Ayrshire, Scotland, her father, Robert II Stewart King of Scotland, was 32 and her mother, Elizabeth Mure of Rowallan, was 28. She married John Dunbar 1st Earl of Moray on 11 July 1370, in Scotland, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 1 daughter. She died on 6 May 1417, in Darnaway Castle, Moray, Scotland, United Kingdom, at the age of 69.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Marjorie Stewart Countess of Moray est née en 1348, à Kyle, Ayrshire, Écosse, son père, Robert II Stewart King of Scotland, avait 32 ans et sa mère, Elizabeth Mure of Rowallan, avait 28 ans. Elle a épousé John Dunbar 1st Earl of Moray le 11 juillet 1370, à Écosse, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée le 6 mai 1417, à Darnaway Castle, Moray, Écosse, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 69 ans.

ja.lifeSummary: Marjorie Stewart Countess of Morayが1348年にスコットランドエイルシュアイアクイルで生まれた時，父Robert II Stewart King of Scotlandは32歳，母Elizabeth Mure of Rowallanは28歳であった。1370年7月11日にイギリススコットランドでJohn Dunbar 1st Earl of Morayと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1417年5月6日にイギリススコットランドモーアイダルナワイ カストルで69歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Marjorie Stewart Countess of Moray(이)가 1348년 스컷랜드 에이르실르 키일에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Robert II Stewart King of Scotland(은)는 32세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Elizabeth Mure of Rowallan(은)는 28세였다. 그녀는 1370년 7월 11일 영국 스코틀랜드에서 John Dunbar 1st Earl of Moray(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1417년 5월 6일 영국 스코틀랜드 모라이 더른아웨이 카스틀에서 69세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Marjorie Stewart Countess of Moray родилась в 1348 г. в местности кил, аиршир, Шотландия, её отцу по имени Robert II Stewart King of Scotland было 32 года, а матери, которую звали Elizabeth Mure of Rowallan, 28. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени John Dunbar 1st Earl of Moray 11 июля 1370 г. в местности Шотландия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 1 дочь. Она умерла 6 мая 1417 г. в местности дарнавеи кастл, мореи, Шотландия, Великобритания в возрасте 69 лет.
